🚀 We're Hiring: AI Engineer (n8n) – UAE (Remote / Offshore)

We are looking for a talented AI Engineer with strong expertise in n8n to join our Data & AI team.

📍 Location: UAE - Remote (Offshore)
  Candidate Preferrence: Philippines - Egypt -India
⏳ Contract Role

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and manage AI workflows using n8n
• Build RAG pipelines and Agentic RAG systems
• Integrate LLMs, Vector Databases, Postgres & Python scripts
• Develop robust automation and data pipelines
• Collaborate with Data Engineers, Analysts & Business stakeholders

Required Skills:
• 3–5 years experience as AI Engineer or Automation Engineer
• Strong hands-on experience with n8n
• Mastery in Python & SQL
• Good command on RAG & Agentic systems
• Experience with REST APIs, webhooks & on-premise deployments (advantage)
• Excellent communication skills

Qualifications:
• Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT or related field

If you have solid experience building intelligent automation with n8n and want to work on cutting-edge AI solutions, this role is for you!

📩 Send your CV to: recruiter@ribbitzllc.com  
Subject Line: AI Engineer (n8n) – Current Location – Notice Period

Open to strong offshore candidates who can align with UAE/Gulf time zones.

Technical Recruiter at Trident Systems Pro

We Are Hiring!! - Azure Infra Cloud Engineer with DevOps and Linux - #OpentoWork #WeAreHiring #AzureCloud #DevOps

Company Description
Trident Systems Pro is a solutions-driven organization specializing in innovative technology services and infrastructure management. The company is committed to delivering customized IT solutions for diverse industries, empowering businesses to achieve operational efficiency. With a focus on cutting-edge technologies and client satisfaction, Trident Systems Pro enables its clients to adapt in rapidly evolving digital environments. The organization fosters a collaborative and inclusive workplace culture to drive success and innovation.

Role Description
This is a contract-based remote WFH role for an Azure Infra Cloud Engineer with DevOps and Linux expertise with 4-5years experience. The engineer will focus on designing, implementing, and managing cloud infrastructure solutions within the Azure ecosystem. Responsibilities include ensuring seamless deployment, automation, and scaling, as well as configuring, monitoring, and optimizing Linux environments. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to support DevOps activities and improve infrastructure reliability and performance.

Qualifications
Experience with Cloud Computing and Infrastructure, particularly within Azure environments
Proficiency in Linux systems and administration
Familiarity with Software Development and DevOps practices
Working knowledge of Databases and data management concepts
Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to optimize system performance
Experience with automation tools and CI/CD pipelines is a plus
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field preferred

DM me or send email to tridentsyspro@gmail.com for more details
